info.name: Brolly API
info.description: Full endpoint coverage for the Brolly backend proxy (localhost:4000, mock mode). Covers health, models, chat completions (incl. streaming + validation), usage, cascade config/benchmark, failover kill/revive/sessions, and two end-to-end scenario chains (cascade routing, failover with session takeover).
